subcodes.first_line: O ye dear friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! When in every Dispensation the Sun of Truth did shine forth from the Dayspring of Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء شمس حقیقت در هر دوری چون از مشرق احدیت اشراق نمود از
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @importance of community building, @obedience to and respect for government authority
